intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 75% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 75%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This is your aerobic threshold. Challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You can hold this. Your body knows what to do. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold work: where you live in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: First block: find your rhythm. Don't go too hard too early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is THE rep that makes you faster. The one where most people quit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple as that.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sweet spot work: just below FTP. You should be able to maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay controlled. Don't let power spike. Smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway through. Your mind is weak. Your body is strong. Listen to your body.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 85-95 rpm, Seated. Focus on smooth, sustainable power.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more block. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate threshold called. It's not happy about what you're doing to it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Seated at 85-95 rpm. Focus on efficient pedal stroke.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: One more block. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 90% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: You're in the zone. Maintain focus. Keep breathing rhythmic.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold doing its job.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated climbing position. 70-80 rpm simulates real-world grade.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2 of 3. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've never actually done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2: 92% FTP. This should feel challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 52 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 2 of 3. Cadence drops to 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where mediocre riders crack and champions push through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Congratulations! You've found the exact wattage where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Threshold pace. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target 105% FTP. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Threshold work is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace the grind.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 6 more minutes of this special kind of suffering.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep breath. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold work builds endurance at race pace. Stay controlled.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Sweet spot? There's nothing sweet about this. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold block: maximize time at lactate threshold without crossing into VO2 territory.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 3 of 3. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 12 of 15.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 12/15 — hold 108% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 180s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 12 of 15 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 3 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 12/15. Power: 108%, Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You wanted to get faster. This is how. Stop complaining and pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 3 of 3. Cadence drops to 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Threshold hurts. Get comfortable being uncomfortable. Block 3 of 3.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block. Hold power steady. 300s rest coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Threshold work is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace the grind.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Congratulations! You've found the exact wattage where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block. Hold power steady. 300s rest coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain' (it doesn't, but it should).
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. Give it everything. Cooldown is coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 60% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 60%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
